question: Will the price of Solana be above $80 on April 19?

fragility_points: A 5-6% drawdown over a few days is common enough in crypto to matter.
Single-minute settlement increases path dependence versus broader daily-close framing.
key_assumptions: No sharp crypto-wide or Solana-specific selloff pushes Binance SOL/USDT below 80 by the exact resolving minute.
Recent above-80 trading is a better guide than vivid short-term narratives.
main_logical_chain: The governing contract uses Binance SOL/USDT and one exact 12:00 ET minute close on April 19.
SOL is already above the 80 threshold and recent Binance candle history shows persistence above 80 rather than requiring further upside.
That makes Yes more likely than No on an outside-view basis, but single-minute settlement risk keeps the probability below the market's high-80s pricing.
payload.main_thesis: Yes is more likely than No because SOL is already trading above $80 on Binance and has recently closed above that level consistently, but the market's 89% pricing still looks too high for a single-minute crypto settlement.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for SOL/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.

payload.source_quality_view: Good enough for a medium-difficulty date-sensitive threshold case: Polymarket rules define settlement and Binance directly provides the relevant market data, though independence between sources is only medium.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact 12:00 ET minute close, so ordinary crypto volatility could still produce a temporary dip below 80.

strongest_supports: Binance spot was about 85.25 at research time, giving several dollars of cushion above 80.
Recent daily closes checked from April 7 through April 16 were all above 80.
payload.timing_relevance: High: the market resolves at 2026-04-19 12:00 ET, which is 16:00 UTC, and only that exact Binance 1-minute candle close matters.
unresolved_ambiguities: No major source-of-truth ambiguity remained after review, but the exact April 19 noon ET minute is still inherently timing-sensitive.
payload.what_would_change_view: A drop in SOL toward or below the low-80s before April 19, clear crypto-wide risk-off conditions, or Solana-specific negative news would reduce the Yes probability materially; stable upper-80s trading into the final day would move me closer to the market.
